programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: At an off-season motel a woman turns to Kimble for help with her son who is an unusually bright but troubled child Kimble helps the boy so much that when he has to run from the local sheriff the boy follows after imperiling them both

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Racing against time Mike Nelson attempts a risky rescue of a test pilot trapped in his planes cockpit 60 feet below the oceans surface

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike travels 1500 miles inland to a flooded mine where two men are trapped in a foul air pocket He reaches them but his dilemma is that there is only enough air in his tank to rescue the miners one-at-a-time and not enough air in the pocket for the remaining man to survive until he returns with more air Who will go Who will stay How will he decide

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gallagher picks up a Norwegian resistance leader who has vital target information but he insist on taking his little boy alone which gets some of his men killed in the process

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Carolyn tries to discredit Davids stories about Barnabas and Sarah Julia hypnotizes Vicki a second time to prevent Barnabas from making her his new Josette

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Joe and Victoria realize theres something amiss about Carolyn Carolyn suspects Julia has interfered with Barnabass plans for Vicki

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Elizabeth makes plans to send David away to Boston Carolyn discovers Julia has been hypnotizing Victoria

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia realizes Barnabas plans to kill her when Carolyn attempts to steal her notebook

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Photo Finish a phony psychic channeler becomes possessed by Freddy Krueger Meanwhile Freddy makes a surprise appearance at his class reunion to get even with the prom date who scorned him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A jaded has-been photographer plots the demise of his younger talented protégé when they go on assignment in Central America

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A man murders his beautiful younger wife when she threatens to leave him He then packs her body in a big suitcase and boards a train where he is stalked by an inquisitive detective

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Jack and Ryan become suspicious when they each receive mysterious visits from three friends from their past

programme.desc: A cannibal hermit living in the woods preys on campers and hikers for his food supply

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Professor believes the castaways may be beginning to suffer from Island Madness so he convinces Ginger to use her psychic powers to convince them that a boat is coming to rescue them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A crate containing a lion bound for a zoo washes up on the island But while the other castaways are scared for their lives the lion immediately makes a bond with Gilligan

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Granpda urges Pepino to marry his new girlfriend Rosita when he notices improvements in his work ethic but the McCoys must first help him obtain a dowry by making a favorable impression on the girls demanding Uncle Lopez

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa is stubbornly opposed to Hassies friendship with hot rod enthusiast Eddie Collins and must be convinced that the young man is a serious engineering student and mechanic rather than a hooligan

programme.title: Smart 513

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: A team has made a super computer police car that can tell everything wrong with vehicles generating huge for police depts FBI etc They target and harass BJ McKay and others to put them out of business BJ and his friends decide to fight back against this car that seems to know their every step

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While Hogan detains a German general during an Allied offensive a Gestapo officer looks into Stalag 13s perfect escape record

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans latest underground contacts are secretly German spies

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Its Survival Training for the platoon two-man teams must rough it for five days Thinking Gomer will bring down the platoons rating Sgt Carter takes him for his partner Gomers small-town backwoods upbringing turns out to be an asset

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: The Colonels daughter visits from her all-girls school and the Colonel asks Sgt Carter to find her an escort so of course Gomer Pyle is the perfect choice - at least until her overly protective mother panics

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Earth Final Conflct
programme.desc: Lili wakes up supposedly on Earth after a coma and is told the Jaridians have come and conquered the Taelons She remembers Sandoval telling her she no longer has and Earth-based physiology and believes things are not as they seem

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison falls in love with an alien who was once a slave to the Morthren and who has been revived from stasis to help them restore their power cells

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: An attractive reporter arrives unannounced to interview Arcane but she is not what she seems and her hidden agenda threatens both the doctor and the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing helps Cathy comprehend her late alienated mother by showing her visions of her mothers teen-age life

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans land on the planet Arkadia where glyphs suggest it is the cradle of civilisation from which life on Earth began Now it is desolate and Koenig feels it is unsuitable for colonisation Two renegade crew members have other ideas however and take Helena hostage in their demands to settle on Arkadia

programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Angered by the rising cost of health care an old man tries to pay his friends bills by threatening a businessman with the bombing of his buildings

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An elderly cardinal has been taken prisoner in a fictional Eastern European country because the clergyman is the leader of the political opposition The IMF force is tasked with freeing him from the inescapable prison

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne brings a body into town killed in a strange way The townspeople suspect Cheyenne is part of a rustler gang While Cheyenne is hunting for the killer a girls jealous boyfriend is hunting Cheyenne thinking he killed his brother

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nate Oses learns from everyone he can, including some of the top fighters in MMA. He aspires not only to be a well-prepared fighter but to eventually move on to be a coach and mentor himself, helping to form great fighters in the future.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Justin Basra takes on Jacob Smith at HK51. Justin comes with a tough wrestling background and ends with some lower back tightness. Cam MacDonald fights Sean Michaels and ends with a Tap Out! Cam had a hard weight cut and see how that impacts his fight against Sean Michaels.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. Wrapping up this episode with the Main Event is Corey Devela vs. UFC Veteran Nick 'The Promise' Ring, who keeps going after five knee surgeries. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Computer calculations give Zartan Omega as the probable location of Audric This planet is covered with blue light from the red dwarf sun and grows only giant flowers Upon reaching it though they discover Monster Minds have set up a satellite

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: An unconquered planet in the midst of Monster Minds intrigues the Lightning League and they go to investigate Upon crash landing they discover the energy of the Pride and the vehicles and their own energy is being drained

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A lost Inca priest frozen in ice awakens with knowledge of El Dorado a city of gold hidden in the Andes mountains VENOM promptly kidnaps the priest and his god T-Bob to find the treasure MASK then attempts a daring rescue

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Presto accidentally transports his friends to a faraway place where they face an enormous danger literally Now he must climb to the new heights of courage and master his magic to save the others

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids are adopted by a loving caravan leader who is searching for his daughter who was abducted by a demon
